testcase.name: test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[Which hot tub is smallest? The CR1 at 69" \xd7 60" \xd7 30", seats 5.]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[Which is largest? The CR2 at 81" \xd7 81" \xd7 32", seats 7.]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[Which is round? The CR3 at 80" \xd7 80" \xd7 32", seats 6.]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[What construction do all models use? Seamless rotomold polyethylene shell.]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[What controls do all models use? Balboa (industry standard).]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[What heater options are available? Dual-voltage 1kW (120V) or 4kW (240V) on all three models.]
test_each_common_question_present_as_bullet[How is California Cooperage sold? Through authorized dealer network across US and Canada.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[Which hot tub is smallest? The CR1 at 69" \xd7 60" \xd7 30", seats 5.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[Which is largest? The CR2 at 81" \xd7 81" \xd7 32", seats 7.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[Which is round? The CR3 at 80" \xd7 80" \xd7 32", seats 6.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[What construction do all models use? Seamless rotomold polyethylene shell.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[What controls do all models use? Balboa (industry standard).]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[What heater options are available? Dual-voltage 1kW (120V) or 4kW (240V) on all three models.]
test_each_common_question_as_bullet[How is California Cooperage sold? Through authorized dealer network across US and Canada.]

test_meta_description_unchanged[cr3/index.html-The CR3 is a 6-person round hot tub]
